evals.prompt: How much have I spent on my agentic card this month and what's my limit?
evals.expected_output: Calls banking_get_agent_card_balance and banking_get_agent_card_policy, reports spending and limit in dollars (not microdollars)

evals.prompt: Is my Robinhood agentic card active and ready to use?
evals.expected_output: Calls banking_get_agent_card_status, translates status to plain language, mentions balance/limit

evals.prompt: Show me the last few transactions on my agentic card
evals.expected_output: Calls banking_get_agent_card_transactions, presents a clean table with dates, merchants, and dollar amounts

evals.prompt: I need to buy something online — can you get my card details so I can pay at checkout?
evals.expected_output: Calls banking_get_agent_card_creds and provides card number, CVV, expiry for use at checkout
